R-1.name: Residential 1
R-1.notes: Most restrictive residential district. Common in Town and Brant Point.

R-2.name: Residential 2
R-2.notes: Standard residential. Common in Cliff, Sconset, and parts of Surfside.

R-5.name: Residential 5
R-5.notes: Larger lots. Common in Dionis, Polpis, and Monomoy.

ROH.name: Residential Old Historic
ROH.notes: Historic core of Town. Strictest HDC review. Material and design standards heavily enforced.

LUG-1.name: Limited Use General 1
LUG-1.notes: Rural character. Common in outer Madaket, Cisco, and Tom Nevers areas.

LUG-2.name: Limited Use General 2
LUG-2.notes: Large rural lots. Mid-Island and outer areas. Workforce housing discussions focused here.

SR-1.name: Special Residential 1
SR-1.notes: Transitional residential areas near Town center.

SR-10.name: Special Residential 10
SR-10.notes: Mid-density residential. Naushop and planned development areas.

CI.name: Commercial Industrial
CI.notes: Limited commercial areas. Primarily near airport and industrial park.
